## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feat/` · `fix/` · `ds/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (prototype-level for prototype changes, root for shared changes)
- [ ] `JOURNEY.md` updated if screens were added / changed (prototypes only)
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
